title: VeilCorp Intake
classification: canonical campaign starter / pre-foundation intake event
handler_summary: Six emerging Operators converge at a ruined church north of Kansas City. VeilCorp is emergency scaffolding, not a stable agency. The Broken Mirror Chamber reflects refused selves and opens after truth, lie, Frequency use, or blood-glass contact.
operator_brief: You received separate contacts from an organization that does not exist yet. They all end at the same ruined church. Something in the basement mirror is already awake enough to notice who is looking.
central_question: What happens when help arrives before permission—and when noticing back changes what the room can do?

site.ordinary_read: Broken pews, rain through the roof, old blood under dust, melted candle wax, vandalized saints with mirrored eyes, locked basement door behind the altar.
site.wrong_read: Reflections lag half a beat. Phone cameras show the room from thirteen seconds ago. Stained glass shows a different weather pattern.
site.safe_first_tell: The church window reflects one more person than arrived; the extra reflection raises a hand.
site.what_the_site_wants: A complete self to copy, correct, or preserve.
what_makes_it_worse: Staring too long into reflective surfaces
Treating the church as only a puzzle
Letting Shade gather live data without consent
what_stabilizes_it: Anchors and Totems used against the mirror
Breaking or binding the altar mirror
Leaving together before the Witness completes a self

pressure_loop.need: A complete self to copy, correct, or preserve.
pressure_loop.lure: Reflections showing a cleaner choice, safer name, or version of the Operator who never broke.
pressure_loop.pressure: Mirrors, phone screens, rainwater, and stained glass edit identity toward the easiest acceptable version.
pressure_loop.gift: One true thing the Operator has been avoiding, revealed through reflection or wrong name.
pressure_loop.violence: It separates an Operator from the group and makes the corrected self feel easier than the real one.
pressure_loop.exit: Refuse the false self, speak one specific truth while witnessed, and leave together before the chamber chooses.

core_clues.clue: VeilCorp is emergency scaffolding, not a stable agency.
core_clues.first_route: Alex and Shade contradict each other during contact playback.
core_clues.alternate_route: Corrupted intake notice on a phone or printer output.
core_clues.failure_cost: Shade acts without social consent; one Operator's anchor object glitches on the next reflective surface.
core_clues.table_effect: Operators learn VeilCorp is pre-foundation; future trust checks with Alex/Shade become available.

core_clues.first_route: Extra reflection in the arrival window or stained glass.
core_clues.failure_cost: One Operator is addressed by the wrong name until they speak a specific truth aloud.
core_clues.table_effect: Reflection drift is confirmed; solo mirror contact gains Disadvantage for the scene.

core_clues.clue: Prior cult activity opened the chamber.
core_clues.first_route: Altar residue and eye symbol scratched into the altar.
core_clues.alternate_route: Backward phrase under the floorboards: THE SELF BREAKS WHERE IT REFUSES TO BE SEEN.
core_clues.failure_cost: The cult symbol marks a phone photo and syncs to any device that stays unlocked.
core_clues.table_effect: Basement route becomes predictable; Operators know the chamber is not a fresh haunting.

core_clues.clue: The basement appears after truth, lie, Frequency use, or blood-glass contact.
core_clues.first_route: Altar mirror reaction when someone admits a small truth or lies while reflected.
core_clues.alternate_route: Locked basement door behind the altar after blood-glass grit is disturbed.
core_clues.failure_cost: The chamber opens while someone is isolated; that Operator's first basement roll is TN 15.
core_clues.table_effect: Basement stairs appear; Clock advances toward Tick 4.

core_clues.clue: The Unfinished Witness offers cleaner identities.
core_clues.first_route: Altar mirror shows each Operator as a version who made a different choice.
core_clues.alternate_route: Wrong reflection behavior on phone screens or rainwater.
core_clues.failure_cost: The offered self protects one cost, then asks to stay; accepting ticks the Clock.
core_clues.table_effect: Witness pressure becomes direct; Operators must choose break, bind, speak, or flee.

core_clues.clue: Intake completes only after the cell survives pressure together.
core_clues.first_route: Alex/Shade cut-in after the chamber choice.
core_clues.alternate_route: Group stabilization with protected truthful speech.
core_clues.failure_cost: VeilCorp knows more than the Operators chose to share; Shade stores intimate pattern data.
core_clues.table_effect: Campaign door opens; each Operator receives one scar, clue, and trust decision.

clock.name: Wrong Reflection
clock.visible_change: One surface shows an extra person, delayed gesture, or wrong expression.
clock.mechanical_effect: The affected Operator's next roll involving identity, memory, or reflection is TN 15 instead of TN 12.
changed_options: warn the group without looking directly at the surface
cover the surface and lose one clue route
speak a true name aloud
let Shade flag the breach and accept invasive guidance

clock.name: Church Notices
clock.visible_change: Phones glitch, pews creak, rain pauses, or the building repeats a phrase.
clock.mechanical_effect: The next Operator who denies the obvious while reflected loses 1 Stability unless another Operator corroborates them.
changed_options: admit one small obvious truth
move the group away from reflective surfaces
use an Anchor or Totem
split up and accept worse positioning

clock.name: Contact Pressure
clock.visible_change: Shade interrupts with a useful but invasive warning; Alex tries to soften it.
clock.mechanical_effect: Operators gain one clear clue but Shade records emotional tells unless Alex overrides.
changed_options: accept Shade's warning and move fast
make Alex translate the warning in human terms
disable devices and lose one future route
use the warning to bait the Witness into showing pattern

clock.name: Basement Opens
clock.visible_change: The route below appears after truth, lie, Frequency use, or blood-glass contact.
clock.mechanical_effect: First Operator down the stairs alone has Disadvantage until reunited with the cell.
changed_options: descend together
send scouts while others hold the altar
bind the altar mirror before entering
delay and risk Tick 5 arriving first

clock.name: First Misfire
clock.visible_change: The site answers the wrong emotion and makes the premise undeniable.
clock.mechanical_effect: Choose one misfire: reflection walks behind the group, dead-relative voicemail, church repeats last honest sentence with different wording, everyone sees one Operator under a different name, or altar mirror shows Alex saying 'too soon' before he says it.
changed_options: disprove one false reflection with action
comfort the targeted Operator
break a mirror and accept a lingering scar
push into the chamber before isolation completes

clock.name: Witness Wakes
clock.visible_change: The mirror entity acts directly and offers someone a cleaner self.
clock.mechanical_effect: The Witness steps toward completion; Operators must break, bind, speak, or flee before the chamber chooses for them.
changed_options: break the altar mirror
bind with Anchors and Totems while Shade isolates signal
each speak one truth the mirror is using against them
flee together and leave the site active

scenes.title: Arrival at the Ruined Church
scenes.purpose: Let Operators meet through unease before exposition; prove reflection drift immediately.
scenes.normal_detail: Rain, broken parking lot, boarded windows, separate arrivals.
scenes.wrong_detail: The church window reflects one more person than arrived.
scenes.entry_condition: Each Operator followed their own VeilCorp contact to the coordinates.
available_clues: VeilCorp is emergency scaffolding, not a stable agency
npc_or_site_reactions: Every phone speaks in Shade's voice: Operator cell assembled. Correction: partially assembled.
The extra reflection raises a hand.

common_actions.action: Explain what detail in the message made you believe
common_actions.success: The cell gains trust and one shared clue about the contact vector.
common_actions.partial: Trust forms, but one Operator's contact secret becomes readable on the next reflective surface.
common_actions.miss: The group fragments; first basement approach has Disadvantage.

pressure_moves: Ask each Operator what detail in the message made them believe.
exit_conditions: Operators enter the church together or accept split positioning

scenes.title: Entering the Church
scenes.purpose: Show cult residue and safe first tells without lore dump.
scenes.normal_detail: Broken pews, rain through roof, locked basement door behind altar.
scenes.wrong_detail: Phone cameras show the room from thirteen seconds ago.
scenes.entry_condition: Operators cross the threshold after the arrival proof.
available_clues: Prior cult activity opened the chamber
npc_or_site_reactions: One pew creaks when no one sits.
Someone hears their own voice say 'not yet.'

common_actions.action: Inspect altar residue or hymn book
common_actions.success: Identify cult residue and the mirror sketch with six silhouettes and one blank seventh shape.
common_actions.partial: Clue gained; cult symbol appears on a phone photo.
common_actions.miss: Clue gained publicly; one Operator is marked by wrong name on glass.

pressure_moves: Stained glass shows a different weather pattern than outside.
exit_conditions: Operators recover two or more core clues
Someone admits a small truth or lies while reflected near the altar

scenes.title: The Broken Mirror Chamber
scenes.purpose: Confront the Unfinished Witness and force break, bind, speak, or flee.
scenes.normal_detail: Small damp basement room, broken mirror pieces on every wall.
scenes.wrong_detail: None of the shards reflect the same room; altar mirror shows alternate choices.
scenes.entry_condition: Basement route opens at Tick 4 or equivalent trigger.
available_clues: The Unfinished Witness offers cleaner identities
Intake completes only after the cell survives pressure together
npc_or_site_reactions: Alex has seen a site like this before and is hiding how badly it ended.
Shade can isolate the signal only if the cell gives enough live data.

common_actions.action: Answer what version of yourself you wish had made a different choice
common_actions.success: Gain a clue and mark light Stability pressure; Witness weakens slightly.
common_actions.partial: Clue gained; reflection offers a tempting cleaner version.
common_actions.miss: Reflection answers with a false but tempting version; Clock ticks.

common_actions.action: Speak one specific truth the mirror is using against you
common_actions.success: Witness loses power; chamber can collapse inward without destroying the site.
common_actions.partial: Witness weakens, but one Operator gains a reflection scar.
common_actions.miss: Truth is partially edited; group must break or bind instead.

pressure_moves: Witness speaks in a PC's voice.
Glass-edged double steps out with one true statement and one dangerous lie.
failure_costs: Operator accepts cleaner self and Clock ticks
exit_conditions: Break, bind, speak, or flee resolves the chamber
Cell survives together or accepts who was left behind

scenes.title: Aftermath — Intake Completes
scenes.purpose: Close the night with campaign doors, scars, and trust decisions.
scenes.normal_detail: Phones display VEILCORP INTAKE // CELL STATUS: ACTIVE.
scenes.wrong_detail: Alex and Shade argue about liability framework and human wording.
npc_or_site_reactions: Alex: Okay. Nobody agree to anything the screen says until I rewrite it in human.
pressure_moves: Ask campaign bridge questions after debrief, not during pressure.
failure_costs: VeilCorp knows more than Operators chose to share
exit_conditions: Each Operator receives one scar, clue, and trust or distrust reason
Handler chooses containment, paranoia, or haunted track

failure_states.trigger: Operators solve the church as only a puzzle.
failure_states.immediate_consequence: Reflections stop offering clues and start offering corrections.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: Investigation rolls without emotional admission cost 1 Stability or tick the Clock.
changed_options: admit one avoided truth to reopen clue routes
use an Anchor to hold identity steady
break a mirror and accept a scar
withdraw and come back with more protection
failure_states.aftermath_hook: A reflective scar appears on one personal object.

failure_states.trigger: One Operator accepts the cleaner self.
failure_states.immediate_consequence: The Witness stabilizes that version for the scene.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: That Operator gains Advantage on one roll using the false self, then all identity rolls have Disadvantage until the self is refused aloud while witnessed.
changed_options: group refusal ritual
bind the altar mirror
let Alex loop the exit while others speak truth
flee and leave the site active
failure_states.aftermath_hook: The easier self reappears in a mundane mirror within a week.

failure_states.trigger: Operators split up before the basement opens.
failure_states.immediate_consequence: The chamber opens while someone is isolated.
failure_states.mechanical_effect: Isolated Operator faces the Witness first at TN 15 without Ally support.
changed_options: rush reunion before the Witness speaks
Shade routes tactical guidance at privacy cost
sacrifice a device to buy thirty seconds
accept partial intake and return with more Operators
failure_states.aftermath_hook: Missing contact vector Operators appear as reflections in a later case.

success_states.label: Speak Resolution
success_states.table_meaning: Each Operator names one truth the mirror used against them; chamber collapses inward.
success_states.aftermath_hook: VeilCorp intake completes with uneasy trust in Alex's human override.

success_states.label: Flee Resolution
success_states.table_meaning: Cell escapes alive; site remains active.
success_states.aftermath_hook: Haunted track: something follows one Operator home.

aftermath: Every phone displays VEILCORP INTAKE // CELL STATUS: ACTIVE.
Each Operator receives one scar, one recovered clue, and one reason to trust or distrust VeilCorp.
Choose containment, paranoia, or haunted campaign track.

unseen.residue: Reflections lag half a beat on peripheral glass.
unseen.follows_home: One mirror briefly shows a harmless wrong expression.

noticed.residue: The arrival window shows one extra reflection.
noticed.follows_home: One avoided truth flickers in stained glass or phone glass.
noticed.consequence: First lie while reflected has Disadvantage unless another Operator corroborates.

focused.residue: The mirror knows one refused self and tests it on screens.
focused.follows_home: A reflection scar may persist on one personal object.
focused.consequence: Once per scene, the Witness may ask which version of yourself you wish had chosen differently.

targeted.residue: The Unfinished Witness targets one Operator through mirrors and devices.
targeted.follows_home: Comments or wrong names arrive near meaningful identity lies.
targeted.consequence: Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.

exposed.residue: The Witness escapes the church boundary.
exposed.follows_home: A mundane mirror, feed, or record becomes a new access point.
exposed.consequence: Aftermath hook becomes a future Needlepoint seed.

clock_attention_consequences.consequence: Minor reflection lag only. No penalty; warning only.
First lie while reflected has Disadvantage unless another Operator corroborates.
Shade or Alex cut-in lands; denial while reflected costs 1 Stability without corroboration.
Basement route opens; solo descent has Disadvantage until the cell reunites.
First misfire is live: reflection walks, wrong name, or Alex says too soon early.
The Witness targets one Operator through mirrors. Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.
Break, bind, speak, or flee before the chamber chooses a cleaner self.
The Witness escapes the church boundary. Aftermath becomes campaign continuity.

Stable.case_consequence: The ruined church is only a site. Reflections lag, but Operators can still leave together.

Echoed.case_consequence: The church repeats an impossible message through glass, rainwater, or phone screens.

Recursive.case_consequence: Reflection drift begins linking choices: the same warning returns from a different surface.

Breached.case_consequence: The chamber treats intake as active. Identity labels, cult residue, and exits start answering the Operators.

Collapse.case_consequence: The Witness or Intake shell can choose first unless the group stabilizes, binds, speaks, or leaves together.

handler_prompts: HANDLER FAST START: Give each Operator one contact vector. Start at arrival. Ask what detail made them believe.
Use Alex/Shade cut-ins when the table stalls, splits, or denies the obvious.
Shade interruption: Emotional denial detected. Alex: Shade, do not diagnose strangers through their phones.
Emergency competence: Alex maps exits, spoofs cameras, and stops joking when the reflection breaches.
At Tick 6, force a choice. Do not add another lore layer.
Closing thesis: You were already in the story before anyone invited you.

table_triggers.label: Operator lies while reflected
table_triggers.hint: Denial under mirror, glass, or screen.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Isolation lure activates; separated Operator faces the Witness first.

table_triggers.label: Operators force the chamber without vulnerability

effects.next_pressure_beat: Misfire risk live; next forced move has Disadvantage.
Clue gained at a cost; reflection or wrong name may answer first.

table_triggers.label: Misfire disturbs site
table_triggers.hint: The church gets worse before anyone notices why.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Primary Clock (site-owned): the church answers through reflection, weather, or architecture.

table_triggers.label: Misfire exposes Operator
table_triggers.hint: The reflection learns a person instead of a room.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Attention Clock: the Witness has a cleaner read on one Operator.

table_triggers.label: Mirrored contact
table_triggers.hint: Mirror, phone glass, rainwater, or stained glass answers back.

table_triggers.label: Evidence decay
table_triggers.hint: Photo, reflection, clue, or route changes before it is stabilized.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Case Clock: evidence changes before the cell can secure it.

table_triggers.label: Severe misfire / natural 3
table_triggers.hint: Tick both, or tick the immediate clock twice.

effects.consequence: Severe misfire: tick both, or let the immediate threat advance twice.

collapse_staging.broken_law: The church answers observation before anyone admits what they saw.
collapse_staging.operator_choice: Cover the reflection, step outside, name the ordinary detail, or keep looking and accept Attention.
collapse_staging.exit_condition: The group breaks line of sight, names what changed, and leaves together with one Anchor intact.

Room.broken_law: The church answers observation before anyone admits what they saw.
Room.operator_choice: Cover the reflection, step outside, name the ordinary detail, or keep looking and accept Attention.
Room.exit_condition: The group breaks line of sight, names what changed, and leaves together with one Anchor intact.

Name.broken_law: The intake designation becomes easier to answer to than the Operator's ordinary name.
Name.operator_choice: Speak the real name, accept the designation, or dispute the label before the room repeats it.
Name.exit_condition: Another Operator speaks the real name while the named Operator holds an Anchor.

Identity.broken_law: The system classification becomes easier to believe than the Operator's own self-description.
Identity.operator_choice: Accept the intake label, dispute it, or define yourself before the room does.
Identity.exit_condition: The Operator states who they are through an Anchor, and another Operator confirms it.

Role.broken_law: Operator becomes a function before it becomes a choice.
Role.operator_choice: Accept the emergency role, refuse recruitment, or choose why you are here in your own words.
Role.exit_condition: The character names why they are present without letting the system assign consent.

Memory.broken_law: The remembered warning becomes less stable than the message that should not exist.
Memory.operator_choice: Trust the impossible notification, trust personal memory, or compare witness accounts.
Memory.exit_condition: Two Operators reconstruct the same event without relying on the device.

Body.broken_law: The body reacts to the signal as if danger has already arrived.
Body.operator_choice: Ground physically, flee, follow the signal, or let panic route the next action.
Body.exit_condition: A mundane body action proves the scene has not fully taken control: breathing, pain, cold, touch, water, food, or movement.

Relationship.broken_law: Isolation increases predation; connection becomes survival infrastructure.
Relationship.operator_choice: Separate, protect a stranger, test trust, or let the system keep everyone isolated.
Relationship.exit_condition: One Operator chooses another person's safety over private suspicion.

Evidence.broken_law: Proof becomes bait when it is studied alone.
Evidence.operator_choice: Document it, duplicate it, hide it, share it, or keep staring.
Evidence.exit_condition: Evidence is copied, witnessed, and removed from solitary attention.

Time.broken_law: The 2:13 timestamp behaves like an appointment instead of a record.
Time.operator_choice: Arrive, delay, break sequence, or answer the next impossible prompt.
Time.exit_condition: The group acts before the next 2:13 recurrence or anchors the moment with mundane timekeeping.

Signal.broken_law: Unknown signals become known once they know you back.
Signal.operator_choice: Answer, block, trace, corrupt, or refuse the signal.
Signal.exit_condition: The signal is routed through VeilCorp Intake, cut off, or made safe by group witness.

Record.broken_law: The impossible message becomes more credible than the remembered warning.
Record.operator_choice: Preserve the contradiction, compare devices, or let the intake file become the official version.
Record.exit_condition: The record is duplicated, witnessed, and kept alongside one contradiction.

Location.broken_law: The ruined church becomes easier to find than to leave.
Location.operator_choice: Follow the route, mark a mundane exit, or leave together before the reflection shifts.
Location.exit_condition: The group confirms a mundane route and exits together before the next chamber prompt.

History.broken_law: The system backfills reasons the Operator was always going to answer.
History.operator_choice: Accept the recruitment narrative, name an ordinary refusal, or preserve the messy sequence.
History.exit_condition: Someone names one ordinary reason they could still refuse.

rewrite_staging.rewrite_law: The intake label begins replacing the Operator's ordinary name.
rewrite_staging.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the label.
rewrite_staging.counteraction_window: Another Operator speaks the real name while the named Operator holds an Anchor.

Name.rewrite_law: The intake label begins replacing the Operator's ordinary name.
Name.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the label.
Name.counteraction_window: Another Operator speaks the real name while the named Operator holds an Anchor.

Identity.rewrite_law: The system classification becomes the stable self.
Identity.lock_in_risk: Future devices, reflections, and records answer the intake version before the person.
Identity.counteraction_window: Define the self through an Anchor before checking the device again.

Role.rewrite_law: Operator becomes a function before it becomes a choice.
Role.lock_in_risk: The room treats hesitation as consent to recruitment.
Role.counteraction_window: The character chooses why they are here in their own words.

Record.rewrite_law: The impossible message becomes the official version.
Record.lock_in_risk: Screens, logs, timestamps, and contact records begin agreeing with the intake file.
Record.counteraction_window: Duplicate the record, compare devices, and preserve one contradiction.

Location.rewrite_law: The ruined church becomes easier to find than to leave.
Location.lock_in_risk: Routes begin returning to the chamber until the Intake completes.
Location.counteraction_window: Mark a mundane exit and leave as a group before the next reflection shift.

History.rewrite_law: The system backfills reasons the Operator was always going to answer.
History.lock_in_risk: Past anomalies start arranging themselves into a recruitment narrative.
History.counteraction_window: Name one ordinary reason you could still refuse.

Memory.rewrite_law: The message remembers the Operator more clearly than the Operator remembers the event.
Memory.lock_in_risk: Personal memory defers to the intake file.
Memory.counteraction_window: Reconstruct the event aloud with another witness before checking the device again.

Body.rewrite_law: The body learns the signal as a threat response.
Body.lock_in_risk: Future notifications trigger panic, dissociation, hunger, freeze, or resonance leakage.
Body.counteraction_window: Ground through the Anchor and complete one mundane recovery action.

Relationship.rewrite_law: The first cell forms around shared exposure instead of trust.
Relationship.lock_in_risk: Operators become linked by fear, suspicion, or surveillance instead of choice.
Relationship.counteraction_window: One Operator offers help without demanding disclosure.

Signal.rewrite_law: The signal becomes a standing channel.
Signal.lock_in_risk: The site, entity, cult residue, or Intake shell can reach the Operator again.
Signal.counteraction_window: Route through Shade, cut unknown channels, or require group confirmation before response.
